name: LG_UPDCOLLATRLRISK_123_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE LG_UPDCOLLATRLRISK_123_01
       @CLREF      INT,
       @TRCODE     SMALLINT,
       @NETTOTAL   FLOAT,
       @COEF       SMALLINT,
       @REPORTRATE FLOAT,
       @BILLED     SMALLINT,
       @STATUS     SMALLINT,
       @STATUSDESP SMALLINT,
       @NETTOTALREP FLOAT    AS
DECLARE @RISKTYPE    SMALLINT
DECLARE @DESPRISKINC FLOAT
DECLARE @DESPRISKINCREP FLOAT
DECLARE @USEREP      SMALLINT
DECLARE @CHK         SMALLINT
SELECT  @CHK  = 0
IF  EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_NTLCK_123  WHERE (LOCKSTR = '123-' +
LTRIM(CAST(CAST('01' AS INTEGER) AS VARCHAR)) +'-SERV-1' ))
  BEGIN
       SELECT @CHK = 1
  END
IF (@CHK<>1 ) AND (@CLREF <> 0) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)) AND (@STATUS=0) AND (@STATUSDESP=0)
 BEGIN
 SELECT @RISKTYPE = RISKTYPE, @USEREP = USEREPRISK
         FROM LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK
         WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
         IF (((@TRCODE >= 1) AND (@TRCODE <= 5)) OR (@TRCODE = 26) OR ((@TRCODE >= 30) AND (@TRCODE <= 34)))
           BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTAL
                   IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
                     SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
                   ELSE SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTALREP
             END
          ELSE IF (((@TRCODE >= 6) AND (@TRCODE <= 10)) OR ((@TRCODE >= 35) AND (@TRCODE <= 39)))
                  BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = @COEF * @NETTOTAL
                         IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
                          SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
                         ELSE SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @COEF * @NETTOTALREP
                   END
       IF (@BILLED = 1)
         BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = 0
               SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = 0
         END
          UPDATE LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK
      SET DESPRISKTOTAL = DESPRISKTOTAL + @DESPRISKINC
              WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
         IF (@REPORTRATE <> 0) OR (@NETTOTALREP <> 0)
         UPDATE LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK
         SET REPDESPRISKTOTAL = REPDESPRISKTOTAL + @DESPRISKINCREP
         WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
END
IF (@CHK<>1 ) AND (@CLREF <> 0) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)) AND (@STATUS=4) AND (@STATUSDESP=0)
 BEGIN
 SELECT @RISKTYPE = RISKTYPE, @USEREP = USEREPRISK
         FROM LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK
         WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
         IF (@TRCODE = 1)
           BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTAL
                   IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
                     SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
                   ELSE SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTALREP
             END
          ELSE IF (@TRCODE = 2)
                  BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = @COEF * @NETTOTAL
                         IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
                          SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
                         ELSE  SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @COEF * @NETTOTALREP
                   END
          IF (@BILLED = 1)
          BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = 0
                 SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = 0
           END
         UPDATE LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK
     SET ORDRISKTOTAL = ORDRISKTOTAL + @DESPRISKINC
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
         IF (@REPORTRATE <> 0) OR (@NETTOTALREP <> 0)
           UPDATE LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK
           SET REPORDRISKTOTAL = REPORDRISKTOTAL + @DESPRISKINCREP
           WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
END
IF (@CHK<>1 ) AND (@CLREF <> 0) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)) AND (@STATUS=1) AND (@STATUSDESP=0)
 BEGIN
 SELECT @RISKTYPE = RISKTYPE, @USEREP = USEREPRISK
         FROM LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK
         WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
         IF (@TRCODE = 1)
         BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTAL
                 IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
                    SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
                 ELSE SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTALREP
           END
          ELSE IF (@TRCODE = 2)
                 BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = @COEF * @NETTOTAL
                        IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
                          SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
                        ELSE SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @COEF * @NETTOTALREP
                  END
          IF (@BILLED = 1)
           BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = 0
                 SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = 0
           END
         UPDATE LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK
     SET ORDRISKTOTALSUGG = ORDRISKTOTALSUGG + @DESPRISKINC
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
         IF (@REPORTRATE <> 0) OR (@NETTOTALREP <> 0)
          UPDATE LG_123_01_CLCOLLATRLRISK
         SET REPORDRISKTOTALSUGG = REPORDRISKTOTALSUGG + @DESPRISKINCREP
           WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
END
